seoTitle: Loch Sport vs Loch Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Loch Sport and Loch Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Loch Sport vs Loch Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Loch Sport and Loch Valley.
heading: Loch Sport vs Loch Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Loch Sport, Victoria and Loch Valley, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Loch Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Loch Sport (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Loch Sport or Loch Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Loch Sport has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Loch Valley scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Loch Sport scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Loch Valley scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Loch Sport or Loch Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Loch Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
